harness.working_tree: WIN2METAL Phase 2 (Bucket A) validation on Apple M4 16GB. Binary is the FROZEN base build /Volumes/Untitled/camelid-base-28f224b (camelid v0.1.7-92-g28f224b, commit 28f224b); no src changes in this branch. Outputs salvaged under qa/capability/mac_*_out/<row>/.

evidence.summary: e2e on Metal (qa/capability/smoke.sh, Apple M4): stream_options.include_usage emits a terminal SSE chunk with an empty choices array and usage integers 11/4/15, followed by data: [DONE]. API-shape contract re-confirmed on the Metal backend. Evidence: qa/capability/mac_smoke_out/llama-3.2-1b/stream_usage.txt.
